channel.title: Awesome on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Awesome on Arrans github.io

item.title: sindresorhus/awesome
item.description: 😎 Awesome lists about all kinds of interesting topics

item.title: trimstray/the-book-of-secret-knowledge
item.description: A collection of inspiring lists, manuals, cheatsheets, blogs, hacks, one-liners, cli/web tools and more.

item.title: awesome-selfhosted/awesome-selfhosted
item.description: A list of Free Software network services and web applications which can be hosted on your own servers

item.title: avelino/awesome-go
item.description: A curated list of awesome Go frameworks, libraries and software

item.title: papers-we-love/papers-we-love
item.description: Papers from the computer science community to read and discuss.

item.title: tmrts/go-patterns
item.description: Curated list of Go design patterns, recipes and idioms

item.title: abhisheknaiidu/awesome-github-profile-readme
item.description: 😎 A curated list of awesome GitHub Profile which updates in real time

item.title: awesome-foss/awesome-sysadmin
item.description: A curated list of amazingly awesome open-source sysadmin resources.

item.title: rust-unofficial/awesome-rust
item.description: A curated list of Rust code and resources.

item.title: sdras/awesome-actions
item.description: A curated list of awesome actions to use on GitHub

item.title: oz123/awesome-c
item.description: A curated list of awesome C frameworks, libraries, resources and other shiny things. Inspired by all the other awesome-… projects out there.

item.title: posquit0/Awesome-CV
item.description: 📄 Awesome CV is LaTeX template for your outstanding job application

item.title: Solido/awesome-flutter
item.description: An awesome list that curates the best Flutter libraries, tools, tutorials, articles and more.

item.title: steven2358/awesome-generative-ai
item.description: A curated list of modern Generative Artificial Intelligence projects and services

item.title: alebcay/awesome-shell
item.description: A curated list of awesome command-line frameworks, toolkits, guides and gizmos. Inspired by awesome-php.

item.title: binhnguyennus/awesome-scalability
item.description: The Patterns of Scalable, Reliable, and Performant Large-Scale Systems

item.title: dexteryy/spellbook-of-modern-webdev
item.description: A Big Picture, Thesaurus, and Taxonomy of Modern JavaScript Web Development

item.title: wasabeef/awesome-android-ui
item.description: A curated list of awesome Android UI/UX libraries

item.title: ellisonleao/magictools
item.description: 🎮 📝 A list of Game Development resources to make magic happen.

item.title: iCHAIT/awesome-macOS
item.description:  A curated list of awesome applications, softwares, tools and shiny things for macOS.

item.title: herrbischoff/awesome-macos-command-line
item.description: Use your macOS terminal shell to do awesome things.

item.title: kdeldycke/awesome-falsehood
item.description: 😱 Falsehoods Programmers Believe in

item.title: okhosting/awesome-storage
item.description: A curated list of storage open source tools. Backups, redundancy, sharing, distribution, encryption, etc.

item.title: nikolaydubina/go-recipes
item.description: 🦩 Tools for Go projects

item.title: ligurio/awesome-ci
item.description: List of Continuous Integration services

item.title: JefMari/awesome-wysiwyg-editors
item.description: A curated list of awesome WYSIWYG Editors.

item.title: sedyh/awesome-ebitengine
item.description: A curated list of awesome Ebitengine frameworks, libraries and software

item.title: jpnurmi/awesome-flutter-linux
item.description: A curated list of awesome Linux-specific Flutter packages and projects.

item.title: neutraltone/awesome-stock-resources
item.description: 🌇 A collection of links for free stock photography, video and Illustration websites

item.title: GoogleCloudPlatform/awesome-google-cloud
item.description: A curated list of awesome stuff for Google Cloud.

item.title: gostor/awesome-go-storage
item.description: A curated list of awesome Go storage projects and libraries

item.title: t3chnoboy/awesome-awesome-awesome
item.description: :octocat: A a curated list of curated lists of awesome lists.

item.title: nayafia/awesome-maintainers
item.description: Talks, blog posts, and interviews about the experience of being an open source maintainer

item.title: arran4/awesome-fodmap-resources
item.description: Compilation of Low Fodmap resources

item.title: RayJW/awesome-foss
item.description: A collection of all the FOSS software I regularly use or follow to keep track of privacy respecting alternatives. This is a mirror of a Codeberg repository.

item.title: joenash/awesome-infinidash
item.description: An awesome list for the awe-inspiring power of Infinidash, an imaginary product.
